title: Verb · past
en: "ate" — the past form of the ichidan verb 食べる

title: Platform · migrate TODO
jp: platform-migrate-job.yaml の pb_test_<slug> + sim-users seed はまだ TODO（platform 側に seed:test-env スクリプトが要る）。それまで env は隔離されたまま起動するが、connector / agent-IM mint は degraded になりうる。これは「不完全でも隔離優先」という今回の方針どおり。
en: The platform migration job seed setup is still TODO; until then env stays isolated, possible degraded minting is accepted under the current isolation-first policy.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, NaAdjective, SuruVerb, Sentence, TechnicalTermPart, WhitespacePart, NounPart, AdverbPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, VerbPart, AdjectivePart, SuffixPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 要る = GodanVerb & { type: "godan"; stem: "要"; ending: "る" };
type いう = GodanVerb & { type: "godan"; stem: "い"; ending: "う" };
type 不完全 = NaAdjective & { type: "na-adjective"; stem: "不完全" };

type TypedJapanese = Sentence<[
  TechnicalTermPart<"platform-migrate-job.yaml">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  TechnicalTermPart<"pb_test_<slug> + sim-users seed">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  AdverbPart<"まだ">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  TechnicalTermPart<"TODO">,
  PunctuationPart<"（">,
  TechnicalTermPart<"platform">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  NounPart<"側">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  TechnicalTermPart<"seed:test-env">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  NounPart<"スクリプト">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<要る, "Dictionary">,
  PunctuationPart<"）">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">,
  NounPart<"それ">,
  ParticlePart<"まで">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  TechnicalTermPart<"env">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"隔離">,
  SuffixPart<"された">,
  SuffixPart<"まま">,
  VerbPart<SuruVerb<"起動">, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  TechnicalTermPart<"connector / agent-IM mint">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  TechnicalTermPart<"degraded">,
  WhitespacePart<" ">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  SuffixPart<"なりうる">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">,
  NounPart<"これ">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"「">,
  AdjectivePart<不完全, "Te">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  NounPart<"隔離優先">,
  PunctuationPart<"」">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<いう, "Dictionary">,
  NounPart<"今回">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"方針">,
  SuffixPart<"どおり">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;
